title: Deploying FastAPI on Azure Container Apps
content: Azure Container Apps allows you to deploy FastAPI services with autoscaling, revision management and simplified ingress configuration for cloud-native APIs.

title: Semantic Search Basics for Technical Knowledge Bases
content: Semantic search improves relevance by prioritizing user intent, document meaning and high-value fields such as title, keywords and main body content.

title: Indexing Product Manuals with AI Enrichment
content: Document indexing pipelines can enrich manuals with extracted entities, detected language, chunked content and searchable metadata before publishing to a search index.

title: Building Fraud Review Workflows with Search Filters
content: Fraud operations teams often need faceted navigation, strict filters and highlighted snippets to triage suspicious documents quickly.

title: Using Tags and Categories to Improve Search Recall
content: Well-curated tags and categories help search engines match domain vocabulary and improve recall for technical content discovery.
